## alcyon

An R package for spatial network analysis. Based on the rdepthmap
package and leveraging the sala library from depthmapX

### How to install:

    install.packages("alcyon")

Windows users might need to also install
[Rtools](https://cran.r-project.org/bin/windows/Rtools/)

A demonstration of the package took place in the “Space syntax analysis
in R” workshop of the 12th International Space Syntax Symposium (SSS12)
in China on the 8th of July 2019, the content of which you may find
[here](https://github.com/pklampros/space_syntax_analysis_in_r).

### Development:

Make sure that git hooks are enabled, to avoid committing minor issues:

    git config --local core.hooksPath .githooks/

To be able to do all development tasks (including testing and linting)
all these packages are necessary:

    install.packages(c('sf', 'stars', 'rmarkdown', 'devtools', 'spelling', 'lintr', 'Rcpp', 'knitr', 'testthat', 'withr', 'cyclocomp', 'httr'))

Do not change `configure` directly, instead change `configure.ac` and
run `autoconf`

To force enable OpenMP if R was not built with it, install the source
package with:

    install.packages("alcyon", configure.args = "--enable-force-openmp")

# Package index

## All functions

- [`AgentLookMode`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/AgentLookMode.md)
  : Agent look modes.
- [`AllLineShapeGraph-class`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/AllLineShapeGraph-class.md)
  : All-line Axial ShapeGraph
- [`AxialShapeGraph-class`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/AxialShapeGraph-class.md)
  [`AxialShapeGraph`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/AxialShapeGraph-class.md)
  : Axial ShapeGraph
- [`` `[`( ``*`<AxialShapeGraph>`*`)`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/AxialShapeGraph_subset.md)
  [`` `[<-`( ``*`<AxialShapeGraph>`*`)`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/AxialShapeGraph_subset.md)
  : Subset AxialShapeGraph objects
- [`LatticeMap-class`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/LatticeMap-class.md)
  [`LatticeMap`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/LatticeMap-class.md)
  : LatticeMap
- [`` `[`( ``*`<LatticeMap>`*`)`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/LatticeMap_subset.md)
  [`` `[<-`( ``*`<LatticeMap>`*`)`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/LatticeMap_subset.md)
  : Subset LatticeMap objects
- [`SegmentShapeGraph-class`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/SegmentShapeGraph-class.md)
  [`SegmentShapeGraph`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/SegmentShapeGraph-class.md)
  : Segment ShapeGraph
- [`` `[`( ``*`<SegmentShapeGraph>`*`)`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/SegmentShapeGraph_subset.md)
  [`` `[<-`( ``*`<SegmentShapeGraph>`*`)`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/SegmentShapeGraph_subset.md)
  : Subset SegmentShapeGraph objects
- [`ShapeMap-class`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/ShapeMap-class.md)
  [`ShapeMap`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/ShapeMap-class.md)
  : ShapeMap class
- [`` `[`( ``*`<ShapeMap>`*`)`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/ShapeMap_subset.md)
  [`` `[<-`( ``*`<ShapeMap>`*`)`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/ShapeMap_subset.md)
  : Subset ShapeMap objects
- [`TraversalType`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/TraversalType.md)
  : Traversal types
- [`VGALocalAlgorithm`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/VGALocalAlgorithm.md)
  : VGA Local Analysis algorithms.
- [`agentAnalysis()`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/agentAnalysis.md)
  : Agent Analysis
- [`allToAllTraverse()`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/allToAllTraverse.md)
  : All-to-all traversal
- [`as`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/as.md) :
  as("sf", "ShapeMap")
- [`axialAnalysisLocal()`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/axialAnalysisLocal.md)
  : Axial analysis - local metrics
- [`axialToSegmentShapeGraph()`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/axialToSegmentShapeGraph.md)
  : Axial to Segment ShapeGraph
- [`blockLines()`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/blockLines.md)
  : Block lines on a LatticeMap
- [`connections(`*`<AxialShapeGraph>`*`)`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/connections-AxialShapeGraph-method.md)
  : Get the Axial ShapeGraph connections
- [`connections(`*`<LatticeMap>`*`)`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/connections-LatticeMap-method.md)
  : Get the LatticeMap connections
- [`connections(`*`<SegmentShapeGraph>`*`)`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/connections-SegmentShapeGraph-method.md)
  : Get the Segment ShapeGraph connections
- [`connections()`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/connections.md)
  : Get map connections
- [`createGrid()`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/createGrid.md)
  : Create a LatticeMap through a grid
- [`fillGrid()`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/fillGrid.md)
  : Fill a LatticeMap's grid starting from one or more points
- [`getTopFeatures()`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/getTopFeatures.md)
  : Extract top x percent of features
- [`isovist()`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/isovist.md)
  : Create isovists at point and direction angle
- [`isovist2pts()`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/isovist2pts.md)
  : Create isovists using two points
- [`linkCoords(`*`<AxialShapeGraph>`*`)`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/linkCoords-AxialShapeGraph-method.md)
  : Link two Axial Lines (coordinates)
- [`linkCoords(`*`<LatticeMap>`*`)`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/linkCoords-LatticeMap-method.md)
  : Link two LatticeMap Cells (coordinates)
- [`linkCoords()`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/linkCoords.md)
  : Link map points/lines as if selecting them using points
- [`linkRefs(`*`<AxialShapeGraph>`*`)`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/linkRefs-AxialShapeGraph-method.md)
  : Link two Axial Lines (refs)
- [`linkRefs(`*`<LatticeMap>`*`)`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/linkRefs-LatticeMap-method.md)
  : Link two LatticeMap Cells (refs)
- [`linkRefs()`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/linkRefs.md)
  : Link map points/lines using their refs
- [`links(`*`<AxialShapeGraph>`*`)`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/links-AxialShapeGraph-method.md)
  : Get the Axial ShapeGraph links
- [`links(`*`<LatticeMap>`*`)`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/links-LatticeMap-method.md)
  : Get the LatticeMap links
- [`links()`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/links.md) :
  Get map links
- [`makeAllLineMap()`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/makeAllLineMap.md)
  : Create an All-line Map
- [`makeDepthmapClassicColour()`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/makeColour.md)
  [`makeAxmanesqueColour()`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/makeColour.md)
  [`makePurpleOrangeColour()`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/makeColour.md)
  [`makeBlueRedColour()`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/makeColour.md)
  [`makeGreyScaleColour()`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/makeColour.md)
  [`makeNiceHSBColour()`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/makeColour.md)
  : Single Colour from depthmapX's Palettes
- [`makeVGAGraph()`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/makeVGAGraph.md)
  : Create a graph between visible cells in the LatticeMap
- [`makeVGALatticeMap()`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/makeVGALatticeMap.md)
  : Create a LatticeMap grid, fill it and make the graph
- [`matchPointsToLines()`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/matchPointsToLines.md)
  : Match points to lines
- [`name(`*`<LatticeMap>`*`)`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/name-LatticeMap-method.md)
  : Get the LatticeMap name
- [`name(`*`<ShapeMap>`*`)`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/name-ShapeMap-method.md)
  : Get the ShapeMap name
- [`name()`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/name.md) :
  Get map name
- [`oneToAllTraverse()`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/oneToAllTraverse.md)
  : One-to-all traversal
- [`oneToOneTraverse()`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/oneToOneTraverse.md)
  : One-to-one traversal
- [`depthmap.classic.colour()`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/palettes.md)
  [`depthmap.axmanesque.colour()`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/palettes.md)
  [`depthmap.purpleorange.colour()`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/palettes.md)
  [`depthmap.bluered.colour()`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/palettes.md)
  [`depthmap.grayscale.colour()`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/palettes.md)
  [`depthmap.nicehsb.colour()`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/palettes.md)
  : Colour Palettes from depthmapX
- [`plot(`*`<LatticeMap>`*`)`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/plot.LatticeMap.md)
  : plot a LatticeMap
- [`readMetaGraph()`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/readMetaGraph.md)
  : Read MetaGraph
- [`reduceToFewest()`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/reduceToFewest.md)
  : Reduce an All-line Map to two types of fewest-line maps
- [`refIDtoIndex()`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/refIdToIndexAndBack.md)
  [`indexToRefID()`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/refIdToIndexAndBack.md)
  : Ref ID to index and vice-versa
- [`segmentTulipLeafChoice()`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/segmentTulipLeafChoice.md)
  : Segment Tulip Leaf Choice
- [`shapeMapToPolygonSf()`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/shapeMapToPolygonSf.md)
  : ShapeMap to sf Polygon map
- [`shapegraphToGraphData()`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/shapegraphToGraphData.md)
  : Conversion of shapegraph to graph data
- [`unlinkAtCrossPoint(`*`<AxialShapeGraph>`*`)`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/unlinkAtCrossPoint-AxialShapeGraph-method.md)
  : Unlink two Axial Lines (crosspoint)
- [`unlinkAtCrossPoint()`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/unlinkAtCrossPoint.md)
  : Unlink map lines at their crossing point
- [`unlinkCoords(`*`<AxialShapeGraph>`*`)`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/unlinkCoords-AxialShapeGraph-method.md)
  : Unlink two Axial Lines (coordinates)
- [`unlinkCoords(`*`<LatticeMap>`*`)`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/unlinkCoords-LatticeMap-method.md)
  : Unlink two LatticeMap Cells (coordinates)
- [`unlinkCoords()`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/unlinkCoords.md)
  : Unlink map points/lines as if selecting them using points
- [`unlinkRefs(`*`<AxialShapeGraph>`*`)`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/unlinkRefs-AxialShapeGraph-method.md)
  : Unlink two Axial Lines (refs)
- [`unlinkRefs(`*`<LatticeMap>`*`)`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/unlinkRefs-LatticeMap-method.md)
  : Unlink two LatticeMap Cells (refs)
- [`unlinkRefs()`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/unlinkRefs.md)
  : Unlink map points/lines using their refs
- [`unmakeVGAGraph()`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/unmakeVGAGraph.md)
  : Unmake the graph in a LatticeMap
- [`vgaIsovist()`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/vgaIsovist.md)
  : Visibility Graph Analysis - isovist metrics
- [`vgaThroughVision()`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/vgaThroughVision.md)
  : Visibility Graph Analysis - Through Vision
- [`vgaVisualLocal()`](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/reference/vgaVisualLocal.md)
  : Visibility Graph Analysis - Visual local metrics

- [Agent
  Analysis](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/articles/agentAnalysis.md):
- [Axial
  Analysis](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/articles/axialAnalysis.md):
- [Isovists](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/articles/isovists.md):
- [Segment
  Analysis](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/articles/segmentAnalysis.md):

  Analysis](https://spatialnous.github.io/alcyon/articles/vga.md):
